index.title: Transcend Store - Official Store
index.description: Official store of Transcend. Discover our latest collections and exclusive drops.
index.subtitle: Premium streetwear designed with passion.
index.discover_subtitle: Discover the latest trends in streetwear
index.discover_text: We offer a wide range of clothing for men and women, including hoodies, t-shirts, pants, and accessories. All our products are made with high-quality materials and designed with passion.
index.footer_description: Transcend is a streetwear brand based in Congo (Brazzaville), founded in 2025 by Corbac Sama. The brand is inspired by the culture and lifestyle of the Congolese youth, and aims to provide high-quality streetwear clothing for men and women.
index.footer_newsletter_text: Get the latest updates on new arrivals and exclusive drops.
